human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1022 requirements for production-coordination-specific owner routing, evidence handoffs, confidentiality handling, legal, editorial, creative, procurement, finance, rights, contractual, media, vendor, production execution, platform-policy, and signoff boundaries, scenario completeness, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, coordination-handoffs-and-routing, and professional-and-information-services sets are declared and validated.

Scenario coverage includes normal production handoff, missing prerequisites, schedule and owner conflicts, attempted approval authority, client and content workflow handling, confidentiality conflicts, execution spillover, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence facts, conflicting policies, and closure confirmation.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed production handoff status, dependency tracking, blocker management, owner routing, confidentiality handling, approval awareness, and closure confirmation rather than legal, editorial, creative, privacy, procurement, financial, producer-of-record, contractual, rights, media, platform-policy, execution, or final signoff authority.

Source set includes 4A's conduct and agency-search guidance, ANA/4A's agency-search guidance, AICP digital production guidelines, DGA commercial practices, IAB/4A's media-buy terms, IAB Tech Lab ad standards, and FTC advertising and endorsement guidance with explicit refresh and decay posture.

Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported owner transfer, unauthorized disclosure or reuse, unreviewed claim or disclosure approval, unresolved rights or review conflict, production execution spillover, and generic treatment of materially different advertising production channels.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as tenant, channel, engagement, SOW, MSA, NDA, rights, production, vendor, publisher, platform, privacy, claim, disclosure, approval, and authority prerequisites for specialized agency production coordination.

Runtime remains specification-based; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, retrieval wiring, mutation safeguards, rollback controls, and non-regression validation.
